title: Promesa de plataforma abierta de inteligencia
summary: La web promete democratizar inteligencia de nivel McKinsey o BCG mediante una plataforma open source orientada a founders modernos.
verbatim_quotes: "We are developing an open-source platform that allows entrepreneurs to perform research at McKinsey/BCG levels and find data that actually functions."
quotes: "We are developing an open-source platform that allows entrepreneurs to perform research at McKinsey/BCG levels and find data that actually functions."
observations: La promesa de inteligencia abierta esta conectada de forma directa con el repositorio open source enlazado desde la pagina.
La narrativa combina democratizacion de inteligencia con inspiraciones explicitas en AutoResearch y ConsultRalph.
